info.description: HTTP API server for the SPSync platform.
info.title: SPSync API

post.description: Creates a backup job with schedule and job configuration

get.description: Returns an active backup job by ID

put.description: Updates a backup job and replaces schedule + job config

delete.description: Marks a backup job inactive; the record is retained

get.description: Returns all active bucket stores (config is never included)

post.description: Creates a bucket store; config is stored encrypted and never returned

get.description: Returns an active bucket store by ID

put.description: Updates a bucket store; omit config to keep the existing value

delete.description: Marks a bucket store inactive; the record is retained

post.description: Changes the password for the authenticated member
Starts a password reset flow for the given email

get.description: Returns whether the API is running

post.description: Authenticates a member and returns a JWT access token

get.description: Returns all active organizations (secrets are never included)

post.description: Creates an organization; tenant_secret is stored encrypted and never returned

get.description: Returns an active organization by ID

put.description: Updates an organization; omit tenant_secret to keep the existing value

delete.description: Marks an organization inactive; the record is retained

post.description: Creates a new member account and returns a JWT access token
Completes a password reset using the emailed token
